title: Is Your Brain a Quantum Computer?

transcript.text: is the human brain the original quantum
computer let me explain a quantum
computer uses special bits called Q bits
that can be both zero and one at the
same time allowing them to solve much
more complex problems faster than normal
computers it's even believed that
quantum computers can send information
back in time in fact many scientists
have actually documented the ability to
reverse Cubit positions in Quantum
computations meanwhile British Nobel
prize winning physicist Roger Penrose
thinks that the brain is sort of a
biological quantum computer maybe that
explains human intuition why we often
make snap decisions with very little
information that can prove to be very
right maybe this also explains
synchronicities your brain is glitching
into the future and sending back traces
or breadcrumbs for you to follow what do
you think
